overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a spacesuit with a red helmet exploring a foggy industrial facility at night. The character walks steadily along elevated metal walkways and through corridors surrounded by massive machinery, pipes, and cylindrical tanks.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with orange safety railings

events.description: character begins walking forward from the starting platform
fog swirls around the character as they move along the open walkway

agents.ego_description: character in spacesuit with red helmet walking steadily along the elevated platform through the foggy industrial landscape

entered.detail: orange metal safety railings lining the left side of the walkway
elevated metal platform with grating texture
intense artificial light source illuminating the fog
tall industrial structures visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands on an elevated industrial platform surrounded by orange safety railings, with bright floodlights cutting through the foggy night air. Distant industrial towers loom in the haze as the character begins walking forward along the metal walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial module exterior with yellow safety markings

events.description: industrial building wall passes close on the right, temporarily narrowing the view
approaching the entrance to a more enclosed industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway, passing the large industrial module with yellow stripes on the right side

entered.detail: large rectangular industrial structure with metallic exterior panels
yellow safety stripe running horizontally along the building wall
illuminated doorway or hatch on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a large industrial module marked with yellow safety stripes, passing an illuminated doorway. The bright floodlight falls behind as the walkway continues, bordered now only by railings on the left while the building wall dominates the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed industrial maintenance corridor with overhead piping

events.description: entering darker enclosed space with overhead industrial lighting replacing open sky
character makes a slight turn to navigate the corridor bend

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed metal corridor surrounded by overhead pipes and industrial structures

vertical metal support columns for the industrial structure
massive cylindrical industrial tank visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, enclosed industrial corridor where the sky is no longer visible. Overhead pipes and support beams frame the path as the character navigates through the maintenance area, with a large cylindrical tank becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight industrial processing corridor with massive cylindrical tanks

events.description: character looks upward at the massive cylindrical tank structures overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight industrial corridors between massive tanks, looking up at the towering structures

entered.detail: enormous cylindrical industrial tank towering above the walkway
dense network of pipes crossing overhead between structures
metal scaffolding and platforms attached to the industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The character moves through tight corridors between massive industrial tanks and overhead pipe networks. The camera tilts upward to reveal the towering scale of the cylindrical structures as the character continues exploring the industrial facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, floodlit industrial platform into the claustrophobic depths of a massive machinery complex. It begins with the character walking along an elevated walkway bordered by orange safety railings, where bright lights pierce through a thick, foggy night. As the character passes an illuminated doorway and a module marked with yellow safety stripes, the open air recedes and the scene shifts into a darker, enclosed maintenance corridor. The path then narrows further, moving beneath a network of overhead pipes and support beams before turning toward a series of looming cylindrical tanks. Finally, the camera tilts upward to emphasize the towering scale of these industrial structures as the character disappears deeper into the tight corridors of the facility.
